indicators.name: long tables
indicators.rationale: Long tables obstruct the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: chairs around tables
indicators.rationale: Chairs around tables obstruct the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: Ceiling lights can create glare and shadows, which can be distracting during yoga.

indicators.name: hardwood floor
indicators.rationale: Hardwood provides a stable, non-slip surface for yoga mats.

indicators.name: doors
indicators.rationale: Doors can be a safety hazard if they swing open during yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally suitable for yoga due to the presence of long tables and chairs that obstruct the open floor space required for yoga. The hardwood floor provides a stable surface, but the ceiling lights can create glare and shadows, which can be distracting. The presence of doors can pose a safety hazard if they swing open during yoga practice.
